page_content:
Formerly: HIST289I.

HIST143 Power, Ritual, and Society in Western History (3 Credits) Introduces students to influential works of political thinking, in the Western tradition from classical Antiquity to the present, that treat the relationship between power, ritual, and society. Investigates ritual and its relationships to power, both in reality and the imagination of political thinkers.

Credit Only Granted for. HIST289F or HIST143.
